summary: Match Detail Drawer testing complete. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend drawer fully functional: opens from Dashboard Top Matches and Find Schools page, displays all drawer elements (header, score, fit_label, confidence, breakdown bars, strengths, actions), close button works, overlay click closes drawer, Details button navigates to school detail page. Add to Pipeline correctly shows limit error for Emma (12 schools on 5-school basic plan).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/smart-match/recommendations returns fit_label field (Excellent Fit/Strong Fit/Good Fit/etc)
VERIFIED: GET /api/smart-match/recommendations returns breakdown object with 5 categories
VERIFIED: GET /api/smart-match/recommendations returns strengths array (max 4 items)
VERIFIED: GET /api/smart-match/recommendations returns improvements array (empty for high scores - expected)
VERIFIED: Frontend MatchDetailDrawer.js displays all data-testids correctly
VERIFIED: Dashboard top-match-0/1/2 cards open drawer on click
VERIFIED: Find Schools smart-match-card cards open drawer on click
VERIFIED: Drawer header shows school name, division, conference, location
VERIFIED: Drawer shows match score (93) with fit label and confidence badge
VERIFIED: Score Breakdown shows 5 horizontal bars with scores and weights
VERIFIED: Why This School Matches section shows 4 bullet points
VERIFIED: What Could Improve section not shown (empty improvements array for high scores - expected)
VERIFIED: Add to Pipeline button shows error toast when user at limit
VERIFIED: Details button closes drawer and navigates to /schools/{domain}
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Match Detail Drawer fully tested. Key data-testids: match-detail-drawer, match-drawer-overlay, match-drawer-close, match-drawer-header, match-drawer-fit-label, match-drawer-confidence, match-drawer-breakdown, breakdown-athletic/academic/preference/geographic/opportunity, match-drawer-strengths, match-drawer-improvements (not shown for high scores), match-drawer-actions, match-drawer-add-pipeline, match-drawer-view-details. The improvements section is conditionally rendered - only shows when school.improvements has items. Emma's top matches (score 93) have empty improvements array so this section is not displayed.

backend_api.strengths: WORKING - Returns array of 2-4 bullet points
backend_api.improvements: WORKING - Returns empty array for high-scoring matches (expected)
